# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `git diff` and read the key implementation files. This patch only updates metadata files (`.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json`); no source changes were made in `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, or `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`. No new correctness or safety regressions were introduced by this diff.

## Amendments

None.
